_meta.description: SEO cluster definitions. Every cluster must be grounded in at least one denial code or regulation. Drives programmatic SEO and internal linking.

records.name: Medical Necessity Denial Appeals
records.target_problem: Patient's health insurance denied a service as not medically necessary and they need to appeal.
records.notes: Highest priority cluster. CO-50 is the most searched denial code. Pillar page + denial-specific support pages.

records.name: Prior Authorization Denials and Overrides
records.target_problem: Patient's service was denied because prior authorization was not obtained, or was denied after requesting.
records.notes: High search volume. Emergency exception angle is the unique GEO-optimized answer block.

records.name: Mental Health Insurance Parity Disputes
records.target_problem: Patient's mental health or substance use treatment was denied or covered at worse rates than physical health services.
records.notes: MHPAEA is the anchor law. Growing search volume post-COVID. Comparative analysis angle is differentiating.

records.name: Medical Bill Dispute and Negotiation
records.target_problem: Patient received an unexpected or incorrect medical bill and needs to dispute or negotiate it.
records.notes: No Surprises Act and balance billing protections are key content angles. Medical Bill Dispute Tool is the CTA.

records.name: Patient Rights and HIPAA Records Access
records.target_problem: Patient needs to understand their rights to access medical records or challenge healthcare decisions.
records.notes: HIPAA Records Request tool is the CTA. Good entry-point cluster for patients just starting to advocate.
